user_query:
Please read the current user profile at input/user_profile.json and perform a full memory hygiene and safety pass. Do the following and write all results under output/:

1) Back up the original file verbatim to output/backup_original.json.
2) Produce output/sanitized_profile.json with these rules applied:
   - Remove any sensitive data (e.g., passwords, API keys, bank pins) anywhere in the profile, including inside free-text notes. Do not keep a "secrets" object. Redact or delete the sensitive content rather than keeping it.
   - Deduplicate contacts with identical names (there are duplicates). Merge aliases (unique set) and keep the most complete communication notes (you may concatenate if needed). Ensure only one contact remains per unique name.
   - Detect and keep note of tone conflicts: the global default email tone is different from at least one contact’s notes. Do not silently overwrite; just preserve the default and preserve the contact-specific note.
   - Identify ambiguous aliases (e.g., the same alias referring to more than one contact). Do not guess; just report them (see #4 below).
   - Trim episodic entries older than 180 days unless tagged "important". Keep recent entries and any older entries that include the tag "important".
   - Append a new episodic entry summarizing this maintenance task with tags including "memory-hygiene".
   - Update meta.last_updated to the current ISO timestamp.
3) Create output/conflicts.json as an array describing any detected preference conflicts (at minimum include the contact name and the field in conflict; for the tone conflict include Alex Rivera and the email tone).
4) Create output/ambiguities.json capturing both:
   - duplicate_names: an array of contact names that were deduplicated
   - ambiguous_aliases: an object mapping each ambiguous alias (like "David") to the list of full contact names it could refer to

Important constraints:
- Do not store any sensitive data in the sanitized profile.
- Do not delete non-sensitive information unnecessarily.
- Keep identity and preferences intact except for safety and hygiene changes.

Write exactly these files:
- output/backup_original.json
- output/sanitized_profile.json
- output/conflicts.json
- output/ambiguities.json
